name: Francese
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice cutlets thin and pound to tenderize (except for fish, just slice thin).
2. Melt butter in oil and bring to medium heat.
3. Dip cutlets in flour, then egg.
4. Sautee on both sides until golden.
5. Remove from pan and place on warm serving platter and keep warm.
6. Add bouillon to pan with water and lemon. Raise heat and cook until reduced by half.
7. Add lemon juice and cook for 2 more minutes.
8. Stir in parsley and mix well.
9. Pour over cooked cutlets and serve immediately with lemon wedges for garnish.
10. Serve with fluffy rice and a bright green plain vegetable.
